name: edtech-partner-success
description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane (partner-success-manager, success-playbook-designer, qbr-composer, learning-analytics-analyst, ferpa-comms-translator, partner-profile-curator) with 4 skills, 8 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 9-doc knowledge bank: 3 production-lesson files (v0.2.0), 4 foundational files (v0.3.0 — CS frameworks, EdTech segments, PSM metrics, PSM tools 2026), and 2 vertical-depth files (v0.4.0 — ai-in-edtech-2026 with verified vendor pricing + COPPA April 2026 + LAUSD/AllHere diligence, renewal-pricing-conversations-edtech with 120-180 day K-12 clock + multi-year-is-K-12-exception + Recurly 71% price-increase churn stat). Compact inline priors on the 6 affected agents and primary-source citations with retrieval dates. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols including the alternate-methods Capability Grounding Protocol.
